pages.text: The Import Bus actively pulls from the container on its front face. Hoppers, pipes, and other automation can also use any face as $(thing)passive input$() to the network.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.
Place the arrow face against the container to pull from and keep another face joined to the Magic Storage network. Use a compatible wrench with right-click if the front points the wrong way.

The active pull runs every 10 ticks and moves up to one stack that the Core can fully accept. The Bus keeps no local buffer and never exposes stored network items for extraction. If no loaded, usable Core is connected or type capacity is full, the source item stays put.
